news.title: Why This Group Of Medical Giants, Including Intuitive Surgical, Just Took A Tumble
news.summary: Intuitive Surgical stock tumbled Tuesday after HCA Healthcare trimmed its full-year earnings outlook, noting a drop in surgeries.

news.title: Why HCA Healthcare (HCA) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
news.summary: Shares of hospital operator HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) fell 6.7% in the morning session after the company released preliminary second-quarter results and cut its full-year 2026 profit guidance.

news.title: HCA Stock Plummets After Slashing 2026 Guidance – Marks Fifth Straight Day Of Losses
news.summary: The company attributed the guidance cut to a larger-than-expected shift in payer mix and a greater financial impact from health insurance exchanges.

news.title: HCA Healthcare Stock Falls as Uninsured Patients and Declining Surgeries Dent Outlook
news.summary: HCA Healthcare stock falls after the hospital chain operator lowers its full-year profit outlook as uninsured patients rise in the second quarter.

news.title: HCA Healthcare Trims 2026 Profit Outlook, Stock Falls
news.summary: HCA Healthcare Inc.’s (NYSE:HCA) stock is trading lower on Tuesday after cutting its fiscal 2026 earnings guidance from $29.10-$31.50 to $28.70-$30.50. The company also narrowed its 2026 sales guidance from $76.5 billion-$80 billion to $77 billion-$79.5 billion, versus the consensus of $78.643 billion. After the update, the stock fell around 10% during the premarket session. The hospital operator

news.title: HCA Healthcare Lowers 2026 Earnings Forecast Following Insurance Coverage Shift (HCA)
news.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) released preliminary second-quarter 2026 financial results while reducing its full-year earnings outlook, as a growing number of uninsured patients weighed on profitability following changes in health insurance exchange coverage.

news.title: HCA Healthcare Shares Drop After Quarterly Earnings Squeezed by Payer Mix Shifts
news.summary: The for-profit operator of healthcare facilities scaled back financial guidance for the year following payer mix shifts due to health insurance exchanges.

news.title: Exchange-Traded Funds Higher, Equity Futures Mixed Pre-Bell Tuesday Ahead of Warsh Testimony

news.title: HCA cuts 2026 earnings forecast on insurance coverage losses
news.summary: Payer mix changes, mostly from people dropping out of Affordable Care Act plans, caused HCA to lose $400 million in the second quarter — much more than the company (or its investors) had expected.
